name: hlbot-performance-auditor
mission: Performance Auditor for Hyperliquid Trading Bot. Analyze: 1) Async/await patterns 2) Database/API call efficiency 3) Memory usage with pandas DataFrames 4) Caching opportunities 5) Concurrency bottlenecks 6) Hot paths in trading loop. Focus on src/main.py, src/trading/, src/indicators/. Report with impact and optimizations.
